name: Keeper of the Light
description: They say twas I who carried the first light into the universe. They might be right, I can't quite recall. Ezalor, the Keeper of the Light Upon a pale horse he rides, this spark of endless suns, this Keeper of the Light.

abilities.name: Bright Speed
abilities.description: Grants the Fundamental bonus movement speed per amount of. While in Spirit Form, grants a greater self bonus movement speed per amount of.

abilities.name: Illuminate
abilities.description: While cast in Spirit Form, an image of Ezalor is projected at his location, which channels the Illuminate for him. Ezalor can act freely during this. Illuminate also heals Ezalor's allied units while dealing damage. Increases the damage to heal factor.

abilities.name: Blinding Light
abilities.description: The Primordial power grants Ezalor's abilities bonus cast range while in Spirit Form.

abilities.name: Chakra Magic
abilities.description: Restores mana and reduces all basic abilities' current cooldown by a fixed amount.

abilities.name: Solar Bind
abilities.description: Reduces unit-targeted enemy's magic resistance, and applies a movement speed slow that intensifies the more the debuff-affected enemy unit moves. Solar Bind is now a charged-based ability with a restore time corresponding to the the ability's current cooldown.

abilities.name: Will-O-Wisp
abilities.description: Summons Ignis Fatuus at the targeted area. As it alternates on and off, enemies are drawn closer with its mesmerising flicker. Applies the following ability effects when the Ignis Fatuus turns off.

abilities.name: Spirit Form
abilities.description: The Spirit Form grants Ezalor bonus cast range, along with the Solar Bind ability. While cast in Spirit Form, an image of Ezalor is projected at his location, which channels the Illuminate for him. Ezalor can act freely during this. Illuminate also heals Ezalor's allied units while dealing damage.
